title: The Sheriff of Piltover
identity: Piltover’s finest detective, Caitlyn Kiramman uses her keen eye and analytical mind to bring down the city’s criminals and restore peace to its citizens. She excels at range, deploying a variety of traps to limit enemy movement before taking them out with perfectly-aimed rifle shots.
playstyle: Zoner. Piltover’s finest detective, Caitlyn Kiramman uses her keen eye and analytical mind to bring down the city’s criminals and restore peace to its citizens. She excels at range, deploying a variety of traps to limit enemy movement before taking them out with perfectly-aimed rifle shots.
strengths: Marksman identity with long-range pressure and trap control.
Can shape neutral around lanes and threat zones.
Naturally supports patient, space-first team plans.
weaknesses: Close-range defensive needs require more review.
Duo routing after far hits is still research in progress.
partnerWants: A partner who benefits from trap or rifle control
teamProvides: Marksman identity with long-range pressure and trap control.
Can shape neutral around lanes and threat zones.
learningPriorities: Study trap and rifle spacing before choosing a partner.
Verify which assists let her convert from screen-control hits.
questions: Who should I pair with this character?
